put.description: Update the currently authenticated user's details.

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user details.
List all users in the system. Authentication required.
Get all tags used in articles. Authentication required.

delete.description: Unfollow a user by username. Authentication required.

post.description: Follow a user by username. Authentication required.

get.description: Get a user profile by username. Authentication required.

post.summary: Logout endpoint that clears authentication cookies

put.description: Updates an existing article. Authentication required. User must be the author.

get.description: Gets a single article by its slug. Authentication required.

delete.description: Deletes an existing article. Authentication required. User must be the author.
Remove article from favorites. Authentication required.

post.description: Add article to favorites. Authentication required.

get.description: List articles globally. Optional filters for tag, author, favorited user. Authentication required.

post.description: Creates a new article. Authentication required.

get.description: Get articles from followed users. Authentication required.
Get all comments for an article. Authentication required.

post.description: Create a new comment for an article. Authentication required.

delete.description: Delete a comment. Authentication required. Only comment author can delete.

get.description: This endpoint throws a DbUpdateConcurrencyException to test conflict handling.

get.summary: Test endpoint - throws exception in endpoint
get.description: This endpoint throws an exception directly in the endpoint handler to test global exception handling behavior.

get.summary: Test endpoint - throws exception in use case
get.description: This endpoint throws an exception inside the MediatR handler to test exception handling pipeline behavior.

get.summary: Test endpoint - throws nested exceptions directly in endpoint
get.description: This endpoint throws a three-level nested exception directly in the endpoint to test that the global exception handler correctly unwraps inner exceptions.

get.summary: Test endpoint - throws nested exceptions from use case
get.description: This endpoint throws a three-level nested exception inside the MediatR handler to test that the global exception handler correctly unwraps inner exceptions from the MediatR pipeline.

get.summary: Test endpoint - throws exception in endpoint
get.description: This endpoint throws an exception due to needing authorization.
This endpoint triggers validation errors using AddError() and ThrowIfAnyErrors().

post.description: This endpoint triggers validation errors using FluentValidation.

get.description: This endpoint triggers validation errors using FluentValidation.

delete.description: Deletes all users, articles, comments, tags, and user followings from the database. Used for E2E test cleanup.

get.description: Returns whether a feature flag is enabled or disabled.

ProblemDetails.description:
RFC7807 compatible problem details/ error response class. this can be used by configuring startup like so:
app.UseFastEndpoints(c => c.Errors.UseProblemDetails())

title.default: One or more validation errors occurred.

name.description: the name of the error or property of the dto that caused the error

Identity.Bearer.description: ASP.NET Identity bearer token authentication. Enter your token in the text input below.
